name: Exam Pacer for Kids
description: A time training tool for kids taking practice exams so they can improve their pacing skills. It showws how many question should be attempted by when and whats left over. Can also come handy for adults in some other usecase.

name: Investment Simulator
description: Runs a comparitive analysis of house buying and portfolio management under different contribution and return assumptions, so you can see how it actually compounds over time and what is more fetching in the long run.

name: Unit Converter
description: Converts between units of length, weight, volume, and temperature without hunting for the right formula.

name: Split Calculator
description: Splits a shared bill unevenly across people, accounting for who ordered what.

name: Checklist Builder
description: Builds a reusable checklist for repeatable tasks, with steps that reset each time you run through it.

name: Route Finder
description: Finds the shortest route across several stops instead of guessing an order to visit them in.

name: Settings Sync
description: Keeps a small set of preferences in sync across devices without a full account system.

name: Habit Tracker
description: Tracks a handful of daily habits and shows the streak at a glance.
